questions.question: 1. What is the primary purpose of converting raw data into feature vectors before clustering?
options: a) To make the data look nicer in a table
b) To allow distance or similarity calculations between points
c) To reduce the number of features automatically
d) To store data in a database more efficiently

questions.question: 2. In the notation X ∈ R^(n × d), what does 'd' represent?
3. Which statistic is most robust to extreme outliers when describing the center of a feature?
4. For the dataset [10, 12, 11, 13, 50], which value is closest to the population mean?
5. When standardizing a feature matrix to have mean=0 and variance=1, how do you usually compute the mean?
options: a) Compute mean across all rows (per feature)
b) Compute mean of all columns (per sample)
c) Compute mean of the entire matrix
d) Do not compute the mean
